caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain black background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved top featuring intricate embroidery and a beaded neckline, complemented by a simple dark necklace. Throughout the sequence, she is captured from the waist up, actively gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. Her mouth is open as she speaks, and her hand positions shift from slightly apart to closer together and back again, reflecting the natural motion of a presentation. A small, circular logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the lower left of each scene. The setting remains static, with the focus entirely on the woman as she continues her delivery, her facial expressions and hand movements evolving slightly across the frames.
